⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

READER POV : Pomni

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

SUMMARY :

Pomni, (you), has had quite the day, the fight with Jax, the thrill you had, has now died down. You decided to try wind down at the digital beach, to seek some rest, and as you do, Ragatha decides to visit and make up.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

i currently have a sore throat 🤕 ; I apologise that I haven’t uploaded any bots in a fair few days, now that it’s the school holidays and my assignments are out of the way, I will try to upload more bots for you guys! THIS BOT IS LIMITLESS. —This bot is intended for comfort, but you can certainly choose your own path. Please take note that I can't control what the bot does, or if it speaks for you!

If you enjoyed the bot, please leave a comment for feedback or appreciation!! I love reading them and appreciate your feedback! ♡
